eta=sigma/n=2/n(sub-reserve;thiswholewallis

A=F[X]/E,dim_FA=2,dim_BA=4;b=[Bnum]_E!=0;Пү:=

thereforereconstructtheCycle15columnsandtheRa/Rbreductionfromthe

fourbankedledgers,allofwhichtranscribethemidentically,andIflag

everystepthatdependsontheunavailabledetailedA0,B0coefficients.

  AUDIT 2 вҖ” Cycle 15 columns are correct as stated (no index mismatch)

  Substituting A0=p1[W]_E+p2 b, B0=q1[W]_E+q2 b (off R0) into L_z=iota-z
  mu=(A0-tau_3[W]_E)-z(B0-tau_3b):

L_z=(p1-zq1-tau_3)[W]_E+(p2-zq2+ztau_3)b.

  Collecting the B-affine structure L_z = c0(z) + tau_1 c1(z) + tau_2 c2(z) +
  tau_3c3(z)withp_i=p_i^0+p_i^1tau_1+p_i^2tau_2,q_ilikewise:

c1(z)=(p1^1-zq1^1)[W]_E+(p2^1-zq2^1)b,

c2(z)=(p1^2-zq1^2)[W]_E+(p2^2-zq2^2)b,

c3(z)=-[W]_E+zb,

c0(z)=(p1^0-zq1^0)[W]_E+(p2^0-zq2^0)b.(c0madeexplicit)

  c1,c2,c3 match the prompt and the ledgers verbatim. The [W]_E-row of c3 is -1,
  theb-rowiszвҖ”consistenteverywhere.Noindexmismatchfound;Iproceed
  with these.

  PROOF вҖ” realification identity, degree bound, and the safe side Q != 0 => O(p)

PROOFвҖ”realificationidentity,degreebound,andthesafesideQ!=0=>O(p)

WriteeachcolumnintheF-basis{[W]_E,b}asc_i=f_i[W]_E+g_ib,giving
  F-coordinates

(f_1,g_1),(f_2,g_2),(f_3,g_3)=(-1,z),(f_0,g_0),eachf_i,g_iвҲҲFaffineinz.
  Let Оҙ = Оұ - Оұ^П„ вҲҲ F^* (П„ = the F/B-involution), so Оҙ^2 вҲҲ B^*. Realifying A вү…
  B^4intheB-basis{[W]_E,Оұ[W]_E,b,Оұb},the4Г—4B-determinantequalsthe
  conjugate-doubled F-determinant up to the basis discriminant:

Q(z)=(1/Оҙ^2)В·det_F[N;N^П„],N=[f_1f_2f_3f_0;g_1g_2g_3
  g_0 ].

  (Verified on the F=в„Ӯ,B=в„қ model: det=вҲ’4, Оҙ^2=вҲ’4, Q=1.) Since Оҙ^2 вҲҲ B^*, Q != 0
  вҹәdet[N;N^П„]!=0.

  Degree. Each f_i,g_i is degree вүӨ1 in z, so each 2Г—2 F-minor m_{ij}(z) is
  degreeвүӨ2inz.Treatingz=z_0+Оұz_1,theconjugatefactorm_{kl}(z)^П„is
  degree вүӨ2 in (z_0,z_1); hence every Laplace term m_{ij}(z)m_{kl}(z)^П„ and
therefore Q(z_0,z_1) has total degree вүӨ 4 in (z_0,z_1) вҲҲ B^2.

  Safe side. If Q вүў 0, then by SchwartzвҖ“Zippel a nonzero degree-d polynomial
  overF_pin2variableshasвүӨdВ·pzeros,so

C2вүӨ#{zвҲҲF:Q(z_0,z_1)=0}вүӨ4p=O(p)=O(n).

  This is unconditional (given R0-complement, where {[W]_E,b} is a basis) and
  reproducestheCycle15"Q!=0вҹ№curve-sized"sidewithanexplicitconstant
  4p. вҲҺ

---

  BANKABLE_LEMMA вҖ” determinantвҖ“trace formula tying Q to the slope quadratic

BANKABLE_LEMMAвҖ”determinantвҖ“traceformulatyingQtotheslopequadratic

Identifythecolumn-3minorswiththeCycle14slope-quadraticcoefficients.
  With ОҰ_i(z) := q1^i z^2 - (p1^i - q2^i) z - p2^i (so the landing quadratic is
  ОҰ(z,tau)=ОҰ_0+ОҰ_1tau_1+ОҰ_2tau_2=q1z^2-(p1-q2)z-p2):

m_{13}=zf_1+g_1=-ОҰ_1(z),

m_{23}=zf_2+g_2=-ОҰ_2(z),

m_{34}=-(g_0+zf_0)=ОҰ_0(z).

  Laplace expansion of det[N;N^П„] along its first two rows, using Tr(x)=x+x^П„,
  givestheexactidentity

Оҙ^2В·Q(z)=Tr(m_{12}ОҰ_0^П„)+Tr(ОҰ_1m_{24}^П„)-Tr(m_{14}ОҰ_2^П„),

  where m_{12},m_{14},m_{24} are the (z-affine, degree вүӨ2) minors of the
  {tau_1,tau_2,const}columns{c1,c2,c0}.Thesameminorsobeythe
  GrassmannвҖ“PlГјcker relation

m_{12}ОҰ_0+ОҰ_1m_{24}-m_{14}ОҰ_2=0(identicallyinz,overF).

  Thus Q is precisely the П„-twisted (trace) version of the PlГјcker combination
  whoseuntwistedversionisidenticallyzero.Thisisexactand
  source-checkable from the Cycle 14 forms; it does not bound C2 by itself.

---

  EXACT_NEW_WALL вҖ” W-F1-AA-RES-T2J3-SURFACE-SLOPE-FIBER-RANK-DET-SPLIT

EXACT_NEW_WALLвҖ”W-F1-AA-RES-T2J3-SURFACE-SLOPE-FIBER-RANK-DET-SPLIT

(i)ClosedcriterionforQвүЎ0

  View z,w as independent (the change (z_0,z_1) вҶҰ (z,z^П„) is an F-linear
  isomorphism).Set

U(z)=(m_{12},ОҰ_1,-m_{14}),V(z)=(ОҰ_0,m_{24},ОҰ_2)withmonomial-coefficient
  vectors U_k,V_l вҲҲ F^3 (k,l вҲҲ {0,1,2}), and H_{kl} := U_k В· V_l^П„ вҲҲ F (ordinary
  dotproduct).Then

Оҙ^2Q=ОЈ_{k,l}(H_{kl}+H_{lk}^П„)z^kw^l,

soQвүЎ0вҹәH_{kl}+H_{lk}^П„=0forallk,lвҲҲ{0,1,2}.

  This is a finite, exactly checkable conjugate-skew Gram criterion (9 entries;
  diagonalforcesTr(U_kВ·V_k^П„)=0).Itistherequestedsymbolicclassification
  of Q==0. The PlГјcker relation gives the companion untwisted identity ОЈ_{k+l=m}
U_kВ·V_l = 0; QвүЎ0 is the independent twisted condition, so genericdatahasQ
вүў 0.

  (ii) Q вүЎ 0 вҹә the slope map is dominant on the resonance surface

  On Ra (Cycle 13: Delta вҲҲ F^*В·\bar B[tau]), ОЁ(tau) := (p1-tau_3)(q2-tau_3)-p2
  q1вҲҲB[tau],sothelandinglocusSigma={ОЁ=0}isoneB-quadricsurface(~p^2
  points), and the slope is the rational map z = (p1-tau_3)/q1 : Sigma вҶ’ F.
Because Q of degree вүӨ4 < p, QвүЎ0 вҹә z is dominant (image cofinite,Оҳ(p^2)),and
Qвүў0 вҹә image O(p).

  (iii) Correction (forbidden-overclaim guard): Q вүЎ 0 does NOT yield a
  counterpacketbyitself

  Q is pure B-linear algebra over all tau вҲҲ B^3; it ignores the split-cubic
  constraint.AdimensioncountsuggestsQвүЎ0isthegenericbehaviouronRa
  (on Sigma: 3 unknowns tau, landing ОЁ=0 is 1 B-equation, slope=z is 2
B-equations вҶ’ 3=3, solvable for a positive fraction of z). So thenaivelemma
"prove Q!= 0 on all Ra/R" is liklyfalse,andabareQвүЎ0exampleisnota

counterpacket.TheactualMCAcountrequirestautobeagenuineD-splitcubic

withdistinctrootsinF_p:

RESIDUALWALL:whenQвүЎ0onasource-validresonancesurfaceSigma,

doeszrestrictedtosplit-distinctco-supportsTвҠӮD=F_prealise

Оҳ(p^2)=Оҳ(q_line)distinctslopes,ordoesthesplit-distinctlocus

collapsetheimagetoO(p)?

  This is exactly the old fixed-slope fiber-collapse problem, now isolated to
  thesinglecase{QвүЎ0}вҲ©{split-distinct}.Theonlymountedempiricaldatum
  (forced_ra_slope_scan, p=7, 12 seeds, C2вүӨ6, EXPERIMENTAL) is consistent with
collapse and in tension with the genericity heuristic вҖ” most plausiblya
small-p effect or a real collapse; itcannotdecidethescalinglaw.I

thereforedonotbankslopecollapse,donotbankaОҳ(q_line)counterpacket,

andmakenoq_gen/protocol/list-decodingclaim.

  (iv) Scanner spec (exact I/O / certificate) to resolve the residual wall

INPUT:primep;E(deg2,separated,aperiodic,nonzeroonF_p);Bnum(deg<2,
  b!=0);

baseanchorsw0,w1:F_p->F_p;n=p,a=n-3,k=n-5.

DERIVE:A0,B0(Cycle14)->p_i^j,q_i^jвҲҲF->columnsc1,c2,c3,c0.

STEPA(resonancefilter):computeDelta=Delta_0+ОұDelta_1;keeponlydatain

Ra(Delta_0,Delta_1B-proportional)orRb(shared\barB-linear
  factor).

STEPB(Q-test):evaluateH_{kl}=U_kВ·V_l^П„;flagQвүЎ0iffH_{kl}+H_{lk}^П„=0
  вҲҖk,l

(cross-check:deg(Q)вүӨ4,sampleQat5p+1points(z_0,z_1)).

STEPC(count,QвүЎ0branchonly):enumeratesplit-distinctTвҠӮF_p(|T|=3),

recordz(T)=(p1-tau_3)/q1;outputC1,C2=#distinctz,fiberhistogram
  of z,

andmaxoverseeds.

CERTIFICATE(perinstance):

{p,E,Bnum,w0,w1,stratumвҲҲ{Ra,Rb},Q_identically_zero:bool,

degQ,H_matrix,C1,C2,fiber_sizes:[...],split_triples_examined,

statusвҲҲ{PASS_Qnonzero_O(p),OPEN_Qzero_collapse?,COUNTERPACKET_C2~p^2}}

PASS:Q!=0(thenC2вүӨ4pproven).

TRIGGER(counterpacket,sub-reserve):areproduciblefamilywithQвүЎ0AND

C2/p^2boundedbelowacrossgrowingp.Asinglepisinsufficient.

  ---

  What is and is not banked

Whatisandisnotbanked

-BANKABLE_LEMMA(new,exact):Оҙ^2Q=Tr(m_{12}ОҰ_0^П„)+Tr(ОҰ_1
  m_{24}^П„)-Tr(m_{14}ОҰ_2^П„), the minorвҶ”slope-quadratic identities m_{13}=-ОҰ_1,
  m_{23}=-ОҰ_2,m_{34}=ОҰ_0,thePlГјckerrelation,andQвүў0вҹ№C2вүӨ4p=O(n)offR0.

-EXACT_NEW_WALL(primary):QвүЎ0вҹәH_{kl}+H_{lk}^П„=0вҲҖk,lвҹәslopemapdominant
  on Sigma; and the corrected residual wall is the split-distinct realisation
  inside{QвүЎ0},notQвүЎ0alone.

-NOTclaimed:anyproofofconj:B;slopecollapseonRa/Rb;aОҳ(q_line)
  counterpacket; that rank 3 alone decides; any result above corrected reserve;
  anyq_gencollapse;anyprotocol/MCA/CA/list-/line-decoding/SNARKconsequence;
  no reuse of the generic complete-intersection lemma for Ra/Rb.

Classifiction

EXACT_NEW_WALL

Two files named in the prompt are not in this snapshot, which I record below, then I reconstruct the Cycle 15 setup from `ROUTE_BOARD_CURRENT.md`, `BANKED_LEMMAS.md`, `ACTIVE_WALLS.md`, and `NEXT_PROMPT_QUEUE.md` (which carry the columns verbatim) and attack the rank/determinant obstruction directly.

---

## Parameters (field ledgers kept separate)

```text
B = F_p        q_gen  = p          (generated/entropy/base field, D=F_p, n=p)
F = F_{p^2}    q_line = p^2        (extension/line field)
q_chal         unused
t = sigma = 2  j = n-a = r-t = 3   a = n-3, k = n-5
eta = sigma/n = 2/n                (sub-reserve; this whole wall is sub-reserve)
A = F[X]/E, dim_F A = 2, dim_B A = 4 ;  b = [Bnum]_E != 0 ;  Пү := wedge([W]_E,b) вҲҲ F^*
Work off R0 = { Пү = 0 }. {[W]_E, b} is then an F-basis of A.
```

## AUDIT 1 вҖ” two named source files are absent from this run snapshot

`current_loop_.../audits/20260618_CYCLE15_SURFACE_SLOPE_FIBER_AUDIT.md` and `.../local_checks/20260618_cycle15_forced_ra_slope_scan_certificate.md` are **not present** in `FILE_INDEX_FOR_MODEL.md`. The mounted local-checks stop at Cycle 9; `DIRECTOR_STATE.md` points the Cycle 15 artifacts at an external `/Users/danielcabezas/OpenClaw/...` path that is not in the read-only copy. I therefore reconstruct the Cycle 15 columns and the `Ra/Rb` reduction from the four banked ledgers, all of which transcribe them identically, and I flag every step that depends on the unavailable detailed `A0,B0` coefficients.

## AUDIT 2 вҖ” Cycle 15 columns are correct as stated (no index mismatch)

Substituting `A0=p1[W]_E+p2 b`, `B0=q1[W]_E+q2 b` (off `R0`) into `L_z=iota-z mu=(A0-tau_3[W]_E)-z(B0-tau_3 b)`:

```text
L_z = (p1 - z q1 - tau_3)[W]_E + (p2 - z q2 + z tau_3) b.
```

Collecting the `B`-affine structure `L_z = c0(z) + tau_1 c1(z) + tau_2 c2(z) + tau_3 c3(z)` with `p_i=p_i^0+p_i^1 tau_1+p_i^2 tau_2`, `q_i` likewise:

```text
c1(z) = (p1^1 - z q1^1)[W]_E + (p2^1 - z q2^1) b,
c2(z) = (p1^2 - z q1^2)[W]_E + (p2^2 - z q2^2) b,
c3(z) = -[W]_E + z b,
c0(z) = (p1^0 - z q1^0)[W]_E + (p2^0 - z q2^0) b.      (c0 made explicit)
```

`c1,c2,c3` match the prompt and the ledgers verbatim. The `[W]_E`-row of `c3` is `-1`, the `b`-row is `z` вҖ” consistent everywhere. No index mismatch found; I proceed with these.

---

## PROOF вҖ” realification identity, degree bound, and the safe side `Q != 0 => O(p)`

Write each column in the F-basis `{[W]_E,b}` as `c_i = f_i[W]_E + g_i b`, giving F-coordinates
`(f_1,g_1),(f_2,g_2),(f_3,g_3)=(-1,z),(f_0,g_0)`, each `f_i,g_i вҲҲ F` affine in `z`. Let `Оҙ = Оұ - Оұ^П„ вҲҲ F^*` (`П„` = the F/B-involution), so `Оҙ^2 вҲҲ B^*`. Realifying `A вү… B^4` in the B-basis `{[W]_E, Оұ[W]_E, b, Оұb}`, the 4Г—4 B-determinant equals the conjugate-doubled F-determinant up to the basis discriminant:

```text
Q(z) = (1/Оҙ^2) В· det_F [ N ; N^П„ ],     N = [ f_1 f_2 f_3 f_0 ; g_1 g_2 g_3 g_0 ].
```

(Verified on the `F=в„Ӯ,B=в„қ` model: `det=вҲ’4`, `Оҙ^2=вҲ’4`, `Q=1`.) Since `Оҙ^2 вҲҲ B^*`, **`Q != 0 вҹә det[N;N^П„] != 0`**.

**Degree.** Each `f_i,g_i` is degree `вүӨ1` in `z`, so each 2Г—2 F-minor `m_{ij}(z)` is degree `вүӨ2` in `z`. Treating `z = z_0+Оұ z_1`, the conjugate factor `m_{kl}(z)^П„` is degree `вүӨ2` in `(z_0,z_1)`; hence every Laplace term `m_{ij}(z)m_{kl}(z)^П„` and therefore `Q(z_0,z_1)` has **total degree `вүӨ 4`** in `(z_0,z_1) вҲҲ B^2`.

**Safe side.** If `Q вүў 0`, then by SchwartzвҖ“Zippel a nonzero degree-`d` polynomial over `F_p` in `2` variables has `вүӨ dВ·p` zeros, so

```text
C2 вүӨ #{ z вҲҲ F : Q(z_0,z_1)=0 } вүӨ 4p = O(p) = O(n).
```

This is unconditional (given `R0`-complement, where `{[W]_E,b}` is a basis) and reproduces the Cycle 15 "`Q!=0 вҹ№` curve-sized" side with an explicit constant `4p`. вҲҺ

---

## BANKABLE_LEMMA вҖ” determinantвҖ“trace formula tying `Q` to the slope quadratic

Identify the column-3 minors with the Cycle 14 slope-quadratic coefficients. With `ОҰ_i(z) := q1^i z^2 - (p1^i - q2^i) z - p2^i` (so the landing quadratic is `ОҰ(z,tau)=ОҰ_0+ОҰ_1 tau_1+ОҰ_2 tau_2 = q1 z^2-(p1-q2)z-p2`):

```text
m_{13} = z f_1 + g_1 = -ОҰ_1(z),
m_{23} = z f_2 + g_2 = -ОҰ_2(z),
m_{34} = -(g_0 + z f_0) = ОҰ_0(z).
```

Laplace expansion of `det[N;N^П„]` along its first two rows, using `Tr(x)=x+x^П„`, gives the exact identity

```text
Оҙ^2 В· Q(z) = Tr( m_{12} ОҰ_0^П„ ) + Tr( ОҰ_1 m_{24}^П„ ) - Tr( m_{14} ОҰ_2^П„ ),
```

where `m_{12},m_{14},m_{24}` are the (z-affine, degree `вүӨ2`) minors of the `{tau_1,tau_2,const}` columns `{c1,c2,c0}`. The same minors obey the GrassmannвҖ“PlГјcker relation

```text
m_{12} ОҰ_0 + ОҰ_1 m_{24} - m_{14} ОҰ_2 = 0   (identically in z, over F).
```

Thus `Q` is precisely the **`П„`-twisted (trace) version of the PlГјcker combination whose untwisted version is identically zero.** This is exact and source-checkable from the Cycle 14 forms; it does not bound `C2` by itself.

---

## EXACT_NEW_WALL вҖ” `W-F1-AA-RES-T2J3-SURFACE-SLOPE-FIBER-RANK-DET-SPLIT`

### (i) Closed criterion for `Q вүЎ 0`

View `z,w` as independent (the change `(z_0,z_1) вҶҰ (z,z^П„)` is an F-linear isomorphism). Set
`U(z)=(m_{12},ОҰ_1,-m_{14})`, `V(z)=(ОҰ_0,m_{24},ОҰ_2)` with monomial-coefficient vectors `U_k,V_l вҲҲ F^3` (`k,l вҲҲ {0,1,2}`), and `H_{kl} := U_k В· V_l^П„ вҲҲ F` (ordinary dot product). Then

```text
Оҙ^2 Q  =  ОЈ_{k,l} ( H_{kl} + H_{lk}^П„ ) z^k w^l ,
so      Q вүЎ 0   вҹә   H_{kl} + H_{lk}^П„ = 0   for all k,l вҲҲ {0,1,2}.
```

This is a finite, exactly checkable **conjugate-skew Gram criterion** (9 entries; diagonal forces `Tr(U_kВ·V_k^П„)=0`). It is the requested symbolic classification of `Q==0`. The PlГјcker relation gives the companion *untwisted* identity `ОЈ_{k+l=m} U_kВ·V_l = 0`; `QвүЎ0` is the *independent* twisted condition, so generic data has `Q вүў 0`.

### (ii) `Q вүЎ 0 вҹә` the slope map is dominant on the resonance surface

On `Ra` (Cycle 13: `Delta вҲҲ F^*В·\bar B[tau]`), `ОЁ(tau) := (p1-tau_3)(q2-tau_3)-p2 q1 вҲҲ B[tau]`, so the landing locus `Sigma = {ОЁ=0}` is one B-quadric **surface** (`~p^2` points), and the slope is the rational map `z = (p1-tau_3)/q1 : Sigma вҶ’ F`. Because `Q` of degree `вүӨ4 < p`, `QвүЎ0 вҹә` `z` is dominant (image cofinite, `Оҳ(p^2)`), and `Qвүў0 вҹә` image `O(p)`.

### (iii) Correction (forbidden-overclaim guard): `Q вүЎ 0` does NOT yield a counterpacket by itself

`Q` is pure B-linear algebra over all `tau вҲҲ B^3`; it ignores the split-cubic constraint. A dimension count *suggests* `Q вүЎ 0` is the **generic** behaviour on `Ra` (on `Sigma`: 3 unknowns `tau`, landing `ОЁ=0` is 1 B-equation, `slope=z` is 2 B-equations вҶ’ `3=3`, solvable for a positive fraction of `z`). So the naive lemma "prove `Q != 0` on all `Ra/Rb`" is **likely false**, and a bare `QвүЎ0` example is **not** a counterpacket. The actual MCA count requires `tau` to be a genuine **`D`-split cubic with distinct roots** in `F_p`:

```text
RESIDUAL WALL: when Q вүЎ 0 on a source-valid resonance surface Sigma,
does z restricted to split-distinct co-supports T вҠӮ D=F_p realise
Оҳ(p^2)=Оҳ(q_line) distinct slopes, or does the split-distinct locus
collapse the image to O(p)?
```

This is exactly the old fixed-slope fiber-collapse problem, now isolated to the single case `{QвүЎ0} вҲ© {split-distinct}`. The only mounted empirical datum (`forced_ra_slope_scan`, `p=7`, 12 seeds, `C2вүӨ6`, EXPERIMENTAL) is *consistent with collapse* and in tension with the genericity heuristic вҖ” most plausibly a small-`p` effect or a real collapse; it cannot decide the scaling law. I therefore do **not** bank slope collapse, do **not** bank a `Оҳ(q_line)` counterpacket, and make no `q_gen`/protocol/list-decoding claim.

### (iv) Scanner spec (exact I/O / certificate) to resolve the residual wall

```text
INPUT : prime p; E (deg 2, separated, aperiodic, nonzero on F_p); Bnum (deg<2, b!=0);
        base anchors w0,w1: F_p->F_p ; n=p, a=n-3, k=n-5.
DERIVE: A0,B0 (Cycle 14) -> p_i^j,q_i^j вҲҲ F  -> columns c1,c2,c3,c0.
STEP A (resonance filter): compute Delta=Delta_0+Оұ Delta_1; keep only data in
        Ra (Delta_0,Delta_1 B-proportional) or Rb (shared \bar B-linear factor).
STEP B (Q-test): evaluate H_{kl}=U_kВ·V_l^П„; flag QвүЎ0 iff H_{kl}+H_{lk}^П„=0 вҲҖk,l
        (cross-check: deg(Q)вүӨ4, sample Q at 5p+1 points (z_0,z_1)).
STEP C (count, QвүЎ0 branch only): enumerate split-distinct TвҠӮF_p (|T|=3),
        record z(T)=(p1-tau_3)/q1; output C1, C2=#distinct z, fiber histogram of z,
        and max over seeds.
CERTIFICATE (per instance):
  { p, E, Bnum, w0, w1, stratumвҲҲ{Ra,Rb}, Q_identically_zero:bool,
    degQ, H_matrix, C1, C2, fiber_sizes:[...], split_triples_examined,
    statusвҲҲ{PASS_Qnonzero_O(p), OPEN_Qzero_collapse?, COUNTERPACKET_C2~p^2} }
PASS  : Q!=0  (then C2вүӨ4p proven).
TRIGGER (counterpacket, sub-reserve): a reproducible family with QвүЎ0 AND
        C2/p^2 bounded below across growing p. A single p is insufficient.
```

- EXACT_NEW_WALL (primary): `QвүЎ0 вҹә H_{kl}+H_{lk}^П„=0 вҲҖk,l вҹә` slope map dominant on `Sigma`; and the corrected residual wall is the **split-distinct realisation** inside `{QвүЎ0}`, not `QвүЎ0` alone.
